nodes.name: Watch invoices folder
nodes.notes: Swap for Google Drive / OneDrive / Dropbox trigger as needed. Watches for new .xlsx invoices dropped by factories.

messageValues.content:
=You are an invoice-extraction agent. Convert the spreadsheet rows below into our canonical JSON schema.

Factory layout: {{$json.factory}}
Source file: {{$json.fileName}}

Canonical schema (output exactly this shape, nothing else, valid JSON only):

{
  "lines": [
    {
      "uid": "string",
      "po": "string",
      "po_sent_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
      "sku": "string",
      "quantity": number,
      "karat": "14K | 18K | 22K",
      "color": "White Gold | Yellow Gold | Rose Gold",
      "gold_weight_g": number,
      "gold_price_usd_per_oz": number,
      "diamonds": [
        { "shape": "Round|Princess|Oval|Cushion|Emerald|Pear|Marquise|Asscher|Radiant|Heart|SideBag",
          "quality": "<clarity> <color>",
          "carats": number,
          "count": integer,
          "price_per_carat_usd": number }
      ],
      "labour_cost_usd": number,
      "final_cost_usd": number
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Factory A: metal cell like "14K WG" → split into karat + color (WG=White, YG=Yellow, RG=Rose). Stone Description is free text such as `1x 0.50ct Round VS1 F + 20x 0.01ct Round SI1 G` — split on ` + `, parse each token.
- Factory B: ring rows + diamond rows, joined by Tag No. Forward-fill UID on blank cells. Quality `VVS2 / E` → store as `VVS2 E`.
- Factory C: two sheets joined on UID — Ring Summary + Stone Detail.
- Use ISO dates. Numbers are numbers, not strings.
- Return only JSON, no prose, no markdown fences.

Spreadsheet rows (JSON):
{{JSON.stringify($json.rawRows)}}

nodes.name: Write canonical JSON
nodes.notes: Pre-step (Set node) should base64-encode the JSON into `data`. The dashboard upload is this file.
